title: X6851B-15.1.2.127SP01-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.2.145SP02-OP001PF001AZ_20251212100328
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6851B-15.1.2.145SP02(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Updated Google Security Patch to January 1, 2026.
2. Upgraded Folax (voice assistant) to version 4.8.1.

Fixed Issues:
1. Fixed the occasional stability issue during screen recording, improving overall recording reliability.
2. Fixed the issue where the device could occasionally fail to unlock in certain scenarios, making unlocking more reliable and secure.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
